hooks.command: [ -n "$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" ] && { d="$HOME/Library/Application Support/ptyparty/activity"; mkdir -p "$d"; printf %s asking > "$d/.$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" && mv "$d/.$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" "$d/$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID"; }

[ -n "$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" ] && { d="$HOME/Library/Application Support/ptyparty/activity"; mkdir -p "$d"; printf %s idle > "$d/.$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" && mv "$d/.$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID" "$d/$PTYPARTY_TERMINAL_ID"; }
